templates.title: Blank plot
templates.description: Empty 30 × 40 ft plot with a single floor slab. Best when you want to build your house entirely from scratch.

templates.title: Verandah cottage
templates.description: Single-story Konkan cottage: front verandah (4 pillars), living room, kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, hip roof. Small footprint (30 × 40 ft).

templates.title: Two-story Konkan
templates.description: Full two-story house: verandah, living / kitchen / staircase / store / bath on ground; two bedrooms + study + bath on first; hip roof over a loft. 30 × 45 ft plot.

templates.title: L-shape villa
templates.description: Villa with a main house + east wing at right angles. Mixed roof types — hip over the main mass, shed over the wing. 50 × 50 ft plot.

templates.title: Courtyard home
templates.description: Four wings around an open central courtyard, each with its own hip roof. Front hall, kitchen, three bedrooms + bathrooms. 60 × 50 ft plot.

templates.title: Modern flat-roof home
templates.description: Contemporary layout: main flat roof with parapet, plus a shed-roofed porch. Foyer, living, kitchen, master bedroom + bath, utility. 36 × 45 ft plot.
